violations.description: Reheating food. — --Potentially hazardous food * was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. Meat Balls were not properly reheated before placing in hot hold unit.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Area around drink machine was observed to have build up of debris.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in sitting area were not cleaned as frequent as necessary.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
